overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a third-person view of an NCPD police officer character walking through a sunlit urban intersection and along a sidewalk before stopping. The scene features light traffic, scattered pedestrians, and a mix of residential and industrial architecture in what appears to be the Badlands or outskirts area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and sidewalk

events.description: tan sedan drives past from left to right in the background
character steps up onto the sidewalk from the street
green jeep drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: NCPD officer walking across the intersection and along the sidewalk, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt walking past the character on the sidewalk
large military truck driving away from the intersection down the street

entered.detail: large dark-colored 6-wheeled military truck parked initially then driving away
tall concrete barrier wall along the left side of the street
paved asphalt street with red painted curbs and crosswalk markings
low-rise residential structures visible in the distance
tan colored sedan driving through the intersection
concrete sidewalk with red painted curb edge
olive green jeep driving on the street
wooden utility pole with power lines

segments.scene_description: The NCPD officer walks through a sunlit urban intersection, starting near a large military truck and crossing the asphalt road. The character passes a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt and navigates around the curb onto the sidewalk, while various vehicles including a tan sedan and green jeep drive past in the background.

events.description: character stops walking and stands still on the sidewalk corner
camera rotates around the character to reveal front view of the NCPD officer

agents.ego_description: NCPD officer standing idle on the street corner, looking around while the camera orbits to show front view

entered.detail: tall yellow industrial tower structure with scaffolding and platforms
wooden building with American flag hanging from the facade
large black HVAC ventilation unit on the sidewalk
chain-link metal fence running along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character stops on a street corner and stands idle as the camera rotates around to show the front of the NCPD uniform. An industrial tower dominates the right side of the frame while a residential building with an American flag sits on the left. The previous vehicles and concrete barriers are no longer visible as the camera focuses on the stationary character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dynamic walk through a sunlit urban intersection to a stationary character study on a street corner. It begins with the NCPD officer crossing an asphalt road near a large military truck, passing a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt as tan and green vehicles drive by in the background. As the officer navigates around the curb and onto the sidewalk, the camera maintains its forward momentum through the bustling outskirts environment. The scene then shifts as the character comes to a halt, and the camera rotates smoothly to reveal the front of the NCPD uniform. Finally, the focus narrows on the stationary officer, framed between a towering industrial structure on the right and a residential building with an American flag on the left.
